# Code Templates for NetBeans Dialog Pattern

These are copy-paste-ready skeletons based on the actual `dialog_member/` implementation.
Replace `Foo`/`FOO`/`foo` with the actual feature name throughout.

---

## DBStrukt Bindtype

```java
/**
 * TwelveLittleScoutsClerk bindtype for Foo table
 * @author Copyright (c) 2026 Martin Oberzalek
 */
// generated by AI (Claude Sonnet 4.6)
package at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.bindtypes;

import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.bindtypes.*;

public class DBFoo extends DBStrukt
{
    public static final String FOO_IDX_SEQUENCE = "FOO_IDX_SEQUENCE";

    public DBInteger     idx         = new DBInteger("idx", "Idx");
    public DBString      name        = new DBString("name", "Name", 200);
    public DBString      description = new DBString("description", "Description", 500);
    // Add further domain fields here, e.g.:
    // public DBBlob     file_data   = new DBBlob("file_data", "File");
    // public DBString   file_name   = new DBString("file_name", "File Name", 255);
    // public DBString   mime_type   = new DBString("mime_type", "Mime Type", 100);
    public DBHistory     hist        = new DBHistory("hist");
    // Include bp_idx only if scoped to a billing period:
    // public DBInteger  bp_idx      = new DBInteger("bp_idx");

    public DBFoo()
    {
        super("FOO");

        add(idx);
        add(name);
        add(description);
        // add(file_data);
        // add(file_name);
        // add(mime_type);
        add(hist);
        // add(bp_idx);

        idx.setAsPrimaryKey();
        // bp_idx.shouldHaveIndex();

        hist.setTitle(" ");

        setVersion(1);
    }

    @Override
    public DBStrukt getNewOne() {
        return new DBFoo();
    }
}
```

## List Dialog Java

```java
/**
 * TwelveLittleScoutsClerk Dialog for Foo table
 * @author Copyright (c) 2026 Martin Oberzalek
 */
// generated by AI (Claude Sonnet 4.6)
package at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.dialog_foo;

import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.AutoMBox;
import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.BaseDialog;
import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.DefaultInsertOrUpdater;
import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.tablemanipulator.TableManipulator;
import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.transaction.Transaction;
import at.redeye.SqlDBInterface.SqlDBIO.impl.TableBindingNotRegisteredException;
import at.redeye.SqlDBInterface.SqlDBIO.impl.UnsupportedDBDataTypeException;
import at.redeye.SqlDBInterface.SqlDBIO.impl.WrongBindFileFormatException;
import at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.MainWin;
import at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.NewSequenceValueInterface;
import at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.bindtypes.DBFoo;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.List;

public class Foo extends BaseDialog implements NewSequenceValueInterface {

    MainWin mainwin;
    List<DBFoo> values;
    TableManipulator tm;

    public Foo(MainWin mainwin) {
        super(mainwin.getRoot(), "Foo Title");

        initComponents();

        this.mainwin = mainwin;

        DBFoo foos = new DBFoo();

        tm = new TableManipulator(root, jTContent, foos);

        tm.hide(foos.hist.lo_user);
        tm.hide(foos.hist.lo_zeit);
        tm.hide(foos.hist.ae_user);
        tm.hide(foos.hist.an_user);
        tm.hide(foos.hist.an_zeit);
        tm.hide(foos.hist.ae_zeit);
        // tm.hide(foos.bp_idx);  // hide if present

        tm.prepareTable();

        feed_table(false);

        tm.autoResize();

        tableFilter1.setFilter(jTContent);

        if (mainwin.isAzLocked()) {
            jBSave.setEnabled(false);
            jBDel.setEnabled(false);
            jBNew.setEnabled(false);
        }
    }

    private void feed_table() {
        feed_table(true);
    }

    private void feed_table(boolean autombox) {
        new AutoMBox(getTitle(), autombox) {
            @Override
            public void do_stuff() throws Exception {
                tm.clear();
                clearEdited();
                Transaction trans = getTransaction();
                values = trans.fetchTable2(new DBFoo());
                // If scoped to BP: values = trans.fetchTable2(new DBFoo(), "where bp_idx = " + mainwin.getBPIdx());
                for (DBFoo entry : values) {
                    tm.add(entry);
                }
            }
        };
    }

    private void jBCloseActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jBCloseActionPerformed
        if (canClose()) {
            close();
        }
    }//GEN-LAST:event_jBCloseActionPerformed

    private void jBDelActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jBDelActionPerformed
        if (!checkAnyAndSingleSelection(jTContent)) {
            return;
        }
        final int i = tm.getSelectedRow();
        if (i < 0 || i >= values.size()) {
            return;
        }
        AutoMBox al = new AutoMBox(getTitle()) {
            @Override
            public void do_stuff() throws Exception {
                DBFoo entry = values.get(i);
                getTransaction().deleteWithPrimaryKey(entry);
                getTransaction().commit();
                values.remove(i);
                tm.remove(i);
                setEdited();
            }
        };
        if (al.isFailed()) {
            try { getTransaction().rollback(); } catch (Exception ex) { logger.error(ex, ex); }
        }
    }//GEN-LAST:event_jBDelActionPerformed

    private void jBNewActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jBNewActionPerformed
        AutoMBox al = new AutoMBox(Foo.class.getName()) {
            @Override
            public void do_stuff() throws Exception {
                newEntry();
            }
        };
        if (al.isFailed()) {
            try { getTransaction().rollback(); } catch (Exception ex) { logger.error(ex, ex); }
        }
    }//GEN-LAST:event_jBNewActionPerformed

    private void jBSaveActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jBSaveActionPerformed
        new AutoMBox(getTitle()) {
            @Override
            public void do_stuff() throws Exception {
                save();
                close();
            }
        };
    }//GEN-LAST:event_jBSaveActionPerformed

    private void jBEditActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jBEditActionPerformed
        if (!checkAnyAndSingleSelection(jTContent)) {
            return;
        }
        final int i = tm.getSelectedRow();
        if (i < 0 || i >= values.size()) {
            return;
        }
        final EditFoo editFoo = new EditFoo(mainwin, values.get(i));
        editFoo.registerOnCloseListener(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                new AutoMBox(Foo.class.getName()) {
                    @Override
                    public void do_stuff() throws Exception {
                        tm.setEdited(i);
                        setEdited();
                        save();
                        feed_table();
                        toFront();
                    }
                };
            }
        });
        invokeDialogUnique(editFoo);
    }//GEN-LAST:event_jBEditActionPerformed

    private void jTContentMouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jTContentMouseClicked
        if (evt.getClickCount() == 2) {
            jBEditActionPerformed(null);
        }
    }//GEN-LAST:event_jTContentMouseClicked

    // Variables declaration - do not modify//GEN-BEGIN:variables
    private javax.swing.JButton jBClose;
    private javax.swing.JButton jBDel;
    private javax.swing.JButton jBEdit;
    private javax.swing.JButton jBNew;
    private javax.swing.JButton jBSave;
    private javax.swing.JLabel jLInfo;
    private javax.swing.JLabel jLabel1;
    private javax.swing.JPanel jPanel1;
    private javax.swing.JScrollPane jScrollPane1;
    private javax.swing.JTable jTContent;
    private at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.tableFilter tableFilter1;
    // End of variables declaration//GEN-END:variables

    private void save() throws SQLException, UnsupportedDBDataTypeException, WrongBindFileFormatException, TableBindingNotRegisteredException, IOException {
        for (Integer i : tm.getEditedRows()) {
            if (i < 0) continue;
            DBFoo entry = values.get(i);
            DefaultInsertOrUpdater.insertOrUpdateValuesWithPrimKey(getTransaction(), entry, entry.hist, root.getUserName());
        }
        getTransaction().commit();
    }

    private void newEntry() throws SQLException, UnsupportedDBDataTypeException, WrongBindFileFormatException, TableBindingNotRegisteredException, IOException {
        DBFoo entry = new DBFoo();
        entry.idx.loadFromCopy(getNewSequenceValue(DBFoo.FOO_IDX_SEQUENCE));
        // entry.bp_idx.loadFromCopy(mainwin.getBPIdx());  // if scoped to billing period

        CreateFoo createFoo = new CreateFoo(mainwin, this, entry);
        invokeDialogModal(createFoo);

        if (createFoo.pressedSave()) {
            tm.add(entry, true, true);
            values.add(entry);
            setEdited();
            save();
            feed_table();
            toFront();
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean canClose() {
        int ret = checkSave(tm);
        if (ret == 1) {
            jBSaveActionPerformed(null);
        } else if (ret == -1) {
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    }
}
```

## Edit Dialog Java

```java
/**
 * TwelveLittleScoutsClerk Edit dialog for Foo
 * @author Copyright (c) 2026 Martin Oberzalek
 */
// generated by AI (Claude Sonnet 4.6)
package at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.dialog_foo;

import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.AutoMBox;
import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.BaseDialogDialog;
import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.DefaultInsertOrUpdater;
import at.redeye.FrameWork.base.transaction.Transaction;
import at.redeye.FrameWork.widgets.documentfields.DocumentFieldLimit;
import at.redeye.SqlDBInterface.SqlDBIO.impl.TableBindingNotRegisteredException;
import at.redeye.SqlDBInterface.SqlDBIO.impl.UnsupportedDBDataTypeException;
import at.redeye.SqlDBInterface.SqlDBIO.impl.WrongBindFileFormatException;
import at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.MainWin;
import at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.bindtypes.DBFoo;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.List;
import javax.swing.JOptionPane;
import javax.swing.JTextField;

public class EditFoo extends BaseDialogDialog {

    DBFoo entity;
    boolean saved = false;
    MainWin mainwin;

    public EditFoo(MainWin mainwin, DBFoo entity) {
        super(mainwin.root, entity.name.toString());
        initComponents();

        this.entity = entity;
        this.mainwin = mainwin;

        bindVar(jTName, entity.name);
        bindVar(jTDescription, entity.description);
        // Add more bindVar calls here for other fields

        var_to_gui();

        if (mainwin.isAzLocked()) {
            jBSave.setEnabled(false);
        }
    }

    // Override bindVar for DBString to add length limit
    @Override
    public final void bindVar(JTextField field, at.redeye.FrameWork.base.bindtypes.DBString var) {
        super.bindVar(field, var);
        field.setDocument(new DocumentFieldLimit(var.getMaxLen()));
    }

    private boolean check() throws SQLException, TableBindingNotRegisteredException, UnsupportedDBDataTypeException, WrongBindFileFormatException {
        if (entity.name.isEmptyTrimmed()) {
            JOptionPane.showMessageDialog(this, "Name darf nicht leer sein");
            jTName.requestFocus();
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    }

    public boolean pressedSave() {
        return saved;
    }

    private void jBSaveActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jBSaveActionPerformed
        gui_to_var();
        AutoMBox al = new AutoMBox(getTitle()) {
            @Override
            public void do_stuff() throws Exception {
                if (!check()) return;
                DefaultInsertOrUpdater.insertOrUpdateValuesWithPrimKey(getTransaction(), entity, entity.hist, root.getUserName());
                getTransaction().commit();
                saved = true;
                close();
            }
        };
        if (al.isFailed()) {
            try { getTransaction().rollback(); } catch (Exception ex) { logger.error(ex, ex); }
        }
    }//GEN-LAST:event_jBSaveActionPerformed

    private void jBCloseActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jBCloseActionPerformed
        close();
    }//GEN-LAST:event_jBCloseActionPerformed

    // Variables declaration - do not modify//GEN-BEGIN:variables
    private javax.swing.JButton jBClose;
    private javax.swing.JButton jBSave;
    private javax.swing.JLabel jLabel1;
    private javax.swing.JLabel jLabel2;
    private javax.swing.JPanel jPanel1;
    private javax.swing.JTextField jTDescription;
    private javax.swing.JTextField jTName;
    // End of variables declaration//GEN-END:variables
}
```
